title: Luscious Kenyan Plum Stew
description: A cozy, creamy stew that blends sweet plum jam with smoky tofu and coconut milk, served in a stone bowl for a rustic touch.
instructions: Heat the stone-bowl-dolsot over medium heat and add a tablespoon of oil, then splash in the smoked tofu cubes and fry until golden on all sides.
Stir in the smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, letting the spices bloom for 1 minute.
Pour in the vegetable broth and coconut milk, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add the plum jam and apricots, whisking to incorporate the jam fully into the sauce.
Fold in the cashew butter until the stew reaches a creamy consistency, then lower the heat.
Cover and let the stew reduce for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and chopped parsley over the finished stew just before serving.
Ladle the stew into individual bowls, or serve straight from the stone-bowl-dolsot for a rustic presentation.
